narrative:
39 Ohio House district has 77,590 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.8% D−R vs -1.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
